name: Ben Carson
subject: My final email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Carson America Exploratory Committee
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27509517:26469164490:m:1:876315805:7483EC0CE7599C39278BB9FFCB7139B0:r)
---
|

Peter,

On Monday, I will be announcing my decision of whether or not to run for President, so this will be the final email from my Exploratory Committee. This period of time has been a learning process in regards to everything from the issues, to the concerns of my fellow citizens, to the depth of my support. The results have been interesting, and very encouraging.
For example, a new study from Harvard's Institute of Politics found that I am currently the top potential Republican presidential candidate among 18-to-29-year-olds. I would hope that my optimistic message of personal empowerment is part of the reason. In addition to this positive news, [**close to 60,000 people just like you have donated to my exploratory committee since March** ](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27509517:26469164490:m:1:876315805:7483EC0CE7599C39278BB9FFCB7139B0:r)- an astounding number that I am deeply humbled by.

As I have traveled around the country, your prayers, participation and **[generous support](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27509517:26469164490:m:1:876315805:7483EC0CE7599C39278BB9FFCB7139B0:r)** have sustained me. In fact, they have strengthened me.
I hope that you'll closely watch your inbox over the next couple of days so that you'll be one of the first people to know about my decision.

Thank you, and I'll be in touch very soon. Sincerely,
Ben Carson
---
| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27509517:26469164490:m:1:876315805:7483EC0CE7599C39278BB9FFCB7139B0:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27509518:26469164490:m:1:876315805:7483EC0CE7599C39278BB9FFCB7139B0:r)

name: Jeff Roe, Cruz for President
subject: Exciting news this week!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www
body:
Hello Friend,

Some more exciting news this week -- Cruz for President announced the first of many state leadership teams to come! Two days ago, our Iowa State Director Bryan English sent a letter welcoming Matt Schultz, who is serving as chairman, and 23 other state lawmakers, conservative activists, and influencers who are serving as co-chairs, to our Iowa Leadership Team. You can read the letter and view the members of the team here <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/cruz-for-president-welcomes-iowa-leadership-team/>.

The Washington Times also published a great article <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/icymi-washington-times-ted-cruz-hitting-on-a-lot-of-cylinders-in-presidential-campaign/> yesterday highlighting comments from Republican insiders who note Ted's “exceptional” presidential rollout, his strong fundraising ability, and that he is “resonating with voters who are surprised that he does not fit the way he has been portrayed in the media or by the establishment wing of the party.” Please read the full article here <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/icymi-washington-times-ted-cruz-hitting-on-a-lot-of-cylinders-in-presidential-campaign/> and be sure to share it with your friends.

A critical case was agued at the U.S. Supreme Court Tuesday -- on whether the Fourteenth Amendment requires states to license marriages between two people of the same sex and to recognize same-sex marriages licensed and performed in another state. Ted is hopeful that "the Justices of the highest court of our land will rule on the side of the U.S. Constitution and let the people, through their elected State representatives, continue to define marriage as it has been understood since the beginning of time." In case the Supreme Court doesn't, Ted has already filed legislation and a constitutional amendment <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/cruz-it-is-my-sincere-hope-that-the-supreme-court-will-rule-on-the-side-of-the-u-s-constitution/> to prevent federal courts from further interfering with any state’s Constitutionally-protected authority to define marriage.

Back in Washington, Ted continues to lead on the most important national security threat facing our nation -- the prospect of a nuclear Iran. As the Senate debates the Iran Nuclear Agreement Act, Ted introduced an amendment that would require Congress to approve of any deal the Obama Administration might try to make with Iran. He wrote an op-ed this week explaining why his amendment to this legislation is so important. Read it here <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/icymi-sen-cruz-op-ed-in-the-washington-times-congress-must-approve-of-any-iran-deal/>.

It's now been just a little over a month since we launched this campaign, and together we've made remarkable progress, but we still have a long way to go until primary and caucus season -- so if you've already signed up to join us as a volunteer, thank you, if you haven't, please click here to do so today <https://www.tedcruz.org/volunteer/>!

All the best,

Jeff Roe
Campaign Manager
Cruz for President
Press Clips

2012 Santorum Supporter to Chair Ted Cruz's Iowa Campaign
Newsmax <http://www.newsmax.com/Politics/Ted-Cruz-Iowa-Matt-Schultz/2015/04/30/id/641766/>

Ted Cruz ‘hitting on a lot of cylinders’ in presidential campaign
Washington Times <http://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2015/apr/29/ted-cruz-hitting-on-a-lot-of-cylinders-in-presiden/print/>

Ted Cruz To Brody File: Evangelicals Will Decide Who Becomes President Of The United States
CBN <http://blogs.cbn.com/thebrodyfile/archive/2015/04/30/ted-cruz-to-brody-file-evangelicals-will-decide-who-becomes.aspx>

Why Alabamians should vote for Ted Cruz: guest opinion
Alabama.com <http://www.al.com/opinion/index.ssf/2015/04/why_alabamians_should_vote_for.html>

Ted Cruz Sweeps 5 official GOP Straw Polls
The South Carolina Conservative <http://thesouthcarolinaconservative.com/2015/04/28/sc-ted-cruz-sweeps-5-official-gop-straw-polls/>

Cruz: Radicalized left assaulting religious liberty
Des Moines Register <http://www.desmoinesregister.com/story/news/elections/presidential/caucus/2015/04/25/cruz-radicalized-left-assaulting-religious-liberty/26395791/>

Rafael Cruz finds success on speaking circuit as son runs for president
Washington Times <http://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2015/apr/27/rafael-cruz-father-of-ted-cruz-stars-as-2016-campa/?page=all#pagebreak>
CRUZ VIDEOS
<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0kypyTdw2ao&spfreload=10> <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nqKQgxY8AdY> <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9ZjXFwfWUzI> <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FXw-0KCmV7E>
Courageous Conservatives

Reigniting the Promise of America

PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www.tedcruz.org <http://www.tedcruz.org>
P.O. Box 25376, Houston, TX 77265 | (713) 353-4330

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to receive these emails you may unsubscribe here: http://act.tedcruz.org/UnsubscribePage.html?mkt_unsubscribe=1&mkt_tok=3RkMMJWWfF9wsRonv6vKZKXonjHpfsX76%2B0sWKewlMI%2F0ER3fOvrPUfGjI4ASsVgI%2BSLDwEYGJlv6SgFSLHEMaFt3LgJWBg%3D.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Since I was a kid
body:
Donate to my campaign for president now
|
---
---

---
Friend -- I am the son of a Polish immigrant who came to this country at the age of 17 without a nickel in his pocket. My father was a paint salesman who worked every day of his life. He never made a lot of money, and we were never able to get out of our small rented apartment, but he and my mom were able to see my brother and me get college degrees. A pretty big deal for our family. Ever since I was a kid I never liked to see people without money or connections get put down or pushed around. When I came to Congress I tried to be a voice for people who did not have a voice - the elderly, the children, the sick and the poor. And that is what I will be doing as a candidate for president. I will raise the issues and fight the fights that most candidates will try to avoid. [**Can you contribute $5 to our campaign now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1246293622089447424/5632164251268679680?refcode=em150502b&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902) My father loved this country because of the opportunities it gave him, the same opportunities that millions of other working class families have enjoyed. My parents and your parents worked hard so that their kids could do better. That is what the American Dream is all about. I am determined to do all that I can to make certain that that dream, that vision, does not disappear. Together we can accomplish great things: we can create jobs for millions of Americans by rebuilding our crumbling infrastructure; we can make healthcare available for all through a Medicare for All Single Payer system; we can protect our planet from the ravages of climate change; we can save our democracy and government from the disastrous Citizens United Supreme Court decision and pernicious impact of billionaire money; we can end the grotesque level of income and wealth inequality; and we can use the great strength and power of this nation to achieve peace and real security. I believe that together we can change America, and breathe new life into the soul of our nation. That is what this campaign is all about. [**Contribute $5 to our campaign.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1246293622089447424/5632164251268679680?refcode=em150502b&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902) Thank you for your support, friend. Senator Bernie Sanders
---

---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1246293622089447424/5632164251268679680?refcode=emb150501a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902)
---

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but if you'd like to, click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1246293622089447424/7217431320103094272). Stand the against powerful special interests that are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1246293622089447424/5632164251268679680?refcode=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902).
